arts.ttl: Gladbach’s Tim Kleindienst, Joe Scally ready for Bayern Munich showdown
arts.sum: Borussia Mönchengladbach striker Tim Kleindienst is not cowering about the prospect of facing Bayern Munich . If that doesn’t happen, you won’t be able to beat Bayern.

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich’s U-19s make their start into 2025, are set to compete against the likes of Man United and Rangers before the season restarts
arts.sum: While Bayern Munich ’s senior team were limited to a 3 week winter break, the U-19s’ break will have lasted nearly 2 months by the time they face off against FC Köln in the revamped version of the U-19 Bundesliga. However, the U-19s will certainly contest a lot more test matches than the senior team did.

arts.ttl: Joshua Kimmich blows past “request” deadline, Bayern Munich not sweating situation...yet
arts.sum: Bayern Munich set a soft deadline for Joshua Kimmich to let them know — one way or the other — about his decision on whether or not he would be staying in Bavaria or transferring away. That date was January 5th and Kimmich stiff-armed the request as he continues to figure out what he wants to do for his future per Sky Sport Florian Plettenberg :

arts.ttl: BFW 2025 Hot Takes: Vincent Kompany will win the Champions League Finale Dahoam for Bayern Munich
arts.sum: Like most Bayern Munich fans and astute observers of football around the world, I always thought that once the Bavarians had parted ways with Thomas Tuchel, recently relegated Burnley coach and Manchester City alum Vincent Kompany was the obvious choice. Kompany bit it all…and of a Bayern coach you could ask no less.

arts.ttl: Report: Real Madrid offering Bayern Munich star Alphonso Davies €20 million per season salary, including signing bonus
arts.sum: However, Falk did cite a report from Cadena SER, which states that Real Madrid could make a proposal to Davies that includes a salary of €20 million per season (including signing bonus), which would seem to be a lot more than Bayern Munich wants to pay the Canadian: Real Madrid remain in contact with Alphonso Davies’ agent, who is informing them of all steps they’re taking with Bayern, with a meeting in Munich planned for next week.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid transfer target Alphonso Davies set to sign contract imminently
arts.sum: “It’s no secret that we’re talking to the agents of players whose contracts are about to expire,” Eberl stated. Reports from Germany indicate that Alphonso Davies is on the verge of renewing his contract with Bayern Munich, which would be a huge blow for long-term admirers Real Madrid .

arts.ttl: Borussia Mönchengladbach's Tim Kleindienst: "I'm better than Kane at defending"
arts.sum: Since his arrival at the Allianz Arena, Kane has been the Bundesliga's most prolific marksman by some distance, winning the Golden Boot last term with 36 goals and racking up a league-leading 14 strikes so far this time around. Ahead of Borussia Mönchengladbach's duel with Bayern Munich on Saturday evening, Tim Kleindienst has discussed his match-up with superstar Harry Kane - and even believes he surpasses the England captain in one area...

arts.ttl: With time ticking, Bayern Munich’s Max Eberl remains confident in getting deal done with Alphonso Davies
arts.sum: The agent for Bayern Munich star Alphonso Davies will be in Bavaria until January 16th per a report from Sport Bild journalist Tobi Altschäffl (via @iMiaSanMia ): Both sides were already close to reaching an agreement around November 30 after the game against Borussia Dortmund .

arts.ttl: 'So efficient': Kingsley Coman suggests Liverpool have a player who's better than Arsenal's Bukayo Saka
arts.sum: Liverpool and Arsenal have two of the best wingers in world football in Mohamed Salah and Bukayo Saka. Mohamed Salah has been an absolute revelation...

arts.ttl: Borussia Mönchengladbach vs Bayern München preview: Pace-setters look to pick up where they left off
arts.sum: League leaders Bayern München look to restart the Bundesliga campaign similarly to how they entered the winter break, after beating RB Leipzig by five goals to one. Vincent Kompany's men prepare to face a Borussia Mönchengladbach side within touching distance of the European positions.
